repos.author: NousResearch
repos.name: hermes-agent
repos.description: The agent that grows with you
repos.summary: An AI agent framework from NousResearch focused on continuous learning and adaptation — the agent that evolves as it handles tasks.

repos.author: microsoft
repos.name: markitdown
repos.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
repos.summary: A Microsoft utility that converts various file formats (including Office documents) into clean Markdown, useful for preparing documentation for LLM processing.

repos.author: coleam00
repos.name: Archon
repos.description: The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Make AI coding deterministic and repeatable.
repos.summary: An open-source harness/framework builder for AI coding agents, aiming to make AI-assisted development more controlled, reproducible, and deterministic.

repos.author: forrestchang
repos.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
repos.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
repos.summary: A curated CLAUDE.md file distilling Karpathy's insights on common LLM coding mistakes, designed to boost Claude Code's effectiveness with minimal setup.

repos.author: multica-ai
repos.name: multica
repos.description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.
repos.summary: An open-source platform for managing AI coding agents as team members — supports task assignment, progress tracking, and skill accumulation over time.

repos.author: shanraisshan
repos.name: claude-code-best-practice
repos.summary: A community-driven collection of best practices and patterns for using Claude Code effectively in real-world development workflows.

repos.author: TapXWorld
repos.name: ChinaTextbook
repos.summary: An open repository of Chinese K-12 and university textbooks in PDF format, covering the full education spectrum.

repos.author: OpenBMB
repos.name: VoxCPM
repos.description: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
repos.summary: VoxCPM2 is a tokenizer-free multilingual text-to-speech model from OpenBMB, supporting voice cloning, creative voice design, and lifelike speech synthesis across languages.

repos.author: shiyu-coder
repos.name: Kronos
repos.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets
repos.summary: A foundation model specialized in financial market language — designed to understand and generate financial narratives, analyst reports, and market commentary.

repos.author: opendataloader-project
repos.name: opendataloader-pdf
repos.description: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.
repos.summary: An open-source PDF parsing toolkit focused on extracting structured, AI-ready data from PDF documents and automating accessibility workflows.
